blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,856 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
